emails.subject: Re: Meter 6879 - Sept. 00
emails.body: Re: Meter 6879 Sept. 00 This deal was not put in right. The primary term of the contract goes out to 9/30/00. There is no evergreen to the contract. The deal will end when the contract ends. Therefore, I have taken the evergreen off, and added September to it. If you have any questions, let me know. Julie Daren J Farmer 09/13/2000 11:33 AM
